prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock KKK K26 turbocharger (engine code: M31/01) with a Garrett GT2860RS-5 hybrid turbo, paired with a custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe and a Tial 44mm external wastegate to handle boost pressures up to 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) while maintaining spool characteristics for the 2.0L inline-4.

Fuel System: Upgrade to a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump and inject 440cc Siemens Deka 80lb/hr fuel injectors, controlled via a standalone Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with a custom M31/01-specific base map, including knock detection and individual cylinder trimming for the unique combustion chamber design.

Suspension: Install a fully adjustable KW Variant 3 coilover kit (924 Turbo-specific valving) with spherical bearing top mounts, paired with a 25mm front sway bar from a 944 Turbo and a 22mm rear sway bar from a 928S, along with polyurethane bushings from Powerflex (Porsche 924-specific part numbers: PFR9-410 for front control arms, PFR9-411 for rear trailing arms).
estetica: Aero: Fit a 924 Carrera GT-inspired front splitter from Ruf Automobile (part #RUF-924-001) with integrated canards, paired with a custom 924 Turbo-specific rear diffuser from 9ff (model: 9FF-924-DIFF) and a carbon fiber rear spoiler from TechArt (part #TA-924-002) with adjustable angle for downforce tuning.

Wheels: Mount 16x9 ET25 front and 16x10 ET20 rear BBS RS 012 wheels (gold centers) with 225/50ZR16 and 245/45ZR16 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, using custom 924-specific hubcentric spacers from H&R (part #HR-54601) to achieve a flush fitment without fender modifications.

Interior: Replace the stock seats with Recaro SRD-E (924-specific mounting brackets) upholstered in black Alcantara with red stitching, paired with a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (380mm diameter, 6-bolt pattern) and a custom roll cage from Matter Fab (924 Turbo-specific design, TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, bolt-in with removable rear half for track use).
